name: Keiter CPA
description: Offers litigation support, forensic accounting, and financial investigations, specializing in valuations of closely held businesses, litigation consulting, and expert witness services. Primary market is Virginia and the southeast region.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Big 4 quality services with the personal touch and practical approach
Personal touch and practical approach you can only find with a local firm

sentiment.summary: Keiter CPA is highly regarded for combining enterprise-level accounting expertise with personalized, practical service that distinguishes local firms from larger competitors.

name: The Witherspoon Group, LLC
description: Specializes in accounting, business valuation, and economic damages including forensic accounting, asset tracing, fraud investigations, lost profits, lost earnings, business interruption, appraisal and valuation, loss of business value, marital dissolution, partnership disputes, bankruptcy, and restructuring.
